title: pyrus rugosa
intro: Pyrus rugosa, also known as the Korean mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus rugosa include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Pyrus rugosa is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as herbal teas, capsules, or added to topical creams for external use.
